# init [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Domain

## Purpose

Usage: hotam init <dir> [--name <domain-name>]. Scaffolds a new domain: minimal graph.json (seed Stakeholder + seed SETTLED Requirement, all-violations=0 immediately), manifest.json, docs/gen/, and a README.md pointing at the next commands to run. <dir> may be anywhere on disk.
